basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) Administrative Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website iitjammu.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Jammu Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree (any discipline) from a recognised university
qualification.details: Administrative Assistant: Bachelor's Degree (any discipline) from a recognised university. Proficiency in English (written and spoken) is mandatory.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Jammu Administrative Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Administrative Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Administrative Assistant post at IIT Jammu is 05-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Proficiency in English, both written and spoken, is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Administrative Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Administrative Assistant post is 35 years. Age relaxation details, if any, would be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Administrative Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Administrative Assistant position will receive a monthly salary in the range of Rs. 26,800 to Rs. 35,200.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Administrative Assistant post at IIT Jammu.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Administrative Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Administrative Assistant post includes a Trade Test and an Interaction evaluation.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Jammu Administrative Assistant recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for this Administrative Assistant position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
